name: Oatcakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend 1/2 cup of the rolled oats until a fine powder forms.
2. Repeat with the second half of the rolled oats.
3. Combine the blended oats, flour, baking powder, and salt in a bowl.
4. Stir in hot water and melted butter until a dough forms.
5. Sprinkle the remaining 1/4 cup of rolled oats on an oat-covered board.
6. Place the dough on the oat-covered board and roll it into a 10-inch circle.
7. Cut the circle into 12 wedges.
8. Arrange the wedges on an ungreased baking sheet.
9. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes.
10. Turn off the heat, open the oven door, and let the oatcakes firm up and become crisp in the oven for 4 to 5 minutes.
11. Serve with butter or margarine.
